name: rps8a__rps8b_ohnolog_pair
description: Ribosomal protein TGD ohnolog pair rps8a (chr24) / rps8b (chr11). ~85% nucleotide identity in CDS, divergent UTRs. Both copies typically retained because ribosomal protein dosage is under strong stoichiometric balance (Force-Lynch 1999 subfunctionalisation: tissue-specific expression divergence between the two ohnologs is the typical fate). Useful test case for paralog resolution in single-cell RNA-seq.
expected_copy_count: 2 per haplotype across the genome (one TGD-derived pair)
